title: Reporting tool - steps to make it even better
author: Vanin Mark
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Reporting tool is already working in VIVO, but we wanted to make it better and more user-friendly. The whole project were divided into next steps:      

 
	 Database definition. 
	 Criteria evaluation definition. 
	 Report template. 
	 Export & send.
